text:
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"1","subject":"修复 P2-020 代码审计 3 个 ISSUE","description":"代码审计发现 3 个中优先级问题需修复：
1. SnipersHide._solve_custom_question 重复了 utils/arithmetic_solver.py 的 ArithmeticSolver → 改为 import 复用
2. _find_board_slug/_extract_topic_id_from_url/_is_relevant 三个 helper 在 6+ 文件中逐字节重复 → 提取到 XenForoBaseAdapter 基类
3. sites.yaml 中 4 个新论坛 target_boards 使用占位符 ID (1,2,3) → 需替换为真实板块 ID 或标注 TODO","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-04-20T17:53:09.557Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"2","subject":"开发 Batch 3 三个新平台适配器","description":"P2-020 Batch 3 需开发 3 个新平台适配器：
1. Airsoft Pacific (phpBB 平台) — 需新建 phpBBBaseAdapter 基类
2. JCFB (ProBoards 平台) — 可复用 CoachHueyAdapter 的 ProBoards 逻辑
3. Baseball Fever (vBulletin 平台) — 需新建 vBulletinBaseAdapter 基类
每个适配器需包含 register/login/scrape/post_reply + 对应测试文件 + sites.yaml 配置 + __init__.py 注册","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-04-20T17:59:48.867Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"3","subject":"全量测试回归验证","description":"所有适配器（原有 5 + Batch 1+2 新增 5 + Batch 3 新增 3 = 13 个）开发完成后，运行全量 pytest 验证，确保无回归","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-04-20T18:27:40.899Z"}
